_specification: Husqvarna Forest & Garden Web Design Specification
_priority: Husqvarna F&G rules take precedence over generic components
_critical_note: All designs MUST comply with Husqvarna F&G spec - see FocusState, FunctionalColors, Typography, PageLayout, BrandAssets

Button.description: Button component per Husqvarna F&G specification (REQUIRED)

variant_rules.primary: Full-color button - Husqvarna Blue by default, White on images/dark backgrounds. Max ONE per decision context.
variant_rules.ghost: Minimal button, takes less space, de-emphasizes action while keeping it available
variant_rules.icon: Space-saving button with self-explanatory icon centered center-center
variant_rules.buy-cart: ALWAYS use Active Green (#3A7D00) for buy-now and add-to-cart buttons - non-negotiable

critical_rules: If only one action on screen, MUST use primary variant
Maximum ONE primary button per decision context
All buy-now/add-to-cart buttons MUST be Active Green
Every button MUST have a focused state with high-contrast outline
Icon buttons MUST have self-explanatory icons

states.hover: Black overlay with opacity (never solid black or colored tint)
states.focused: High-contrast outline - visually distinct from unfocused
states.rule: All states must be visually distinguishable

Card.description: Card component with strict background contrast rules (REQUIRED)

background_rules.critical: Cards MUST contrast with background - non-negotiable

Input.description: Text input field for user data entry (GENERIC - use with Husqvarna color tokens)
Input._note: Apply Husqvarna F&G color system and 4px spacing rules

Heading.description: Typography component for headings and titles

IconEllipse.description: Icon within circular container per Husqvarna F&G specification

variant_rules.filled: For prominent information and actions (e.g., play buttons)

critical_rules: Icon line-thickness MUST match ellipse line-thickness at all scales
Icon and ellipse MUST use the same color
Icon width (as square) MUST be exactly half the ellipse width
Icons MUST be from a single third-party library (Lucide, Phosphor, Material Symbols, or Heroicons)
NEVER use legacy Husqvarna proprietary icon set
NEVER mix icons from multiple libraries

PageLayout.description: Page layout rules per Husqvarna F&G specification

grid_rules.base_unit: 4px - all spacing and sizing must be multiples
grid_rules.content_max_width: Project-defined, content centered on very large screens

critical_rules: Page background MUST be White, Grey 100, or Grey 200 ONLY
Header/footer MUST be White or Husqvarna Blue ONLY
All elements MUST align to 4px grid (exception: centered text within objects)
Body text line-height MUST be divisible by 4
Must demonstrate mobile-first design approach

Typography.description: Typography rules per Husqvarna F&G specification
Typography.font: Inter (variable font) - ONLY font allowed for Husqvarna F&G

line_length.rule: Never exceed 100 characters - causes reader fatigue

contrast.rule: Avoid both too-low AND too-high contrast (pure black on white not recommended)

text_colors.forbidden: Grey 500 or 700 as body text on bright backgrounds

Typography.modular_scale: Use harmonious proportions derived from body text, not arbitrary values
critical_rules: ONLY Inter font allowed - no Husqvarna Gothic, no Roboto VF
Line-height must be divisible by 4
50-100 character line length
Minimum 3.15:1 contrast ratio

FocusState.description: Mandatory focus state for keyboard navigation
FocusState.critical_rule: EVERY interactive element MUST have a clearly distinguishable focused state
FocusState.treatment: High-contrast outline that contrasts with both the element and background
FocusState.purpose: Allows keyboard users to know which element they are about to interact with
FocusState.compliance: This is a critical accessibility requirement - failure is a major violation

critical_rules: Functional colors MUST ONLY be used for their defined purpose
NEVER use functional colors decoratively
All buy-now/add-to-cart buttons MUST be Active Green
Red elements that are not warnings/errors are violations
Green elements that are not availability/commerce signals are violations

BrandAssets.description: Brand asset application rules - CRITICAL REQUIREMENT
BrandAssets._MANDATORY: Husqvarna logotype stamp MUST be present on all landing pages

assets.note: Currently using WebP. SVG is ideal for scalability if available.

webp.description: CURRENT format - modern web format with excellent compression
benefits: Superior compression (smaller file size than PNG)

svg.description: IDEAL format - vector format for perfect scalability
benefits: Smallest file size for simple graphics

png.description: FALLBACK format - use for legacy browser support

logotype_stamp.placement: Upper-left corner on landing pages - REQUIRED
logotype_stamp.rule: Always use logotype stamp treatment for unified recognition
logotype_stamp.enforcement: Missing logo is a CRITICAL FAILURE - design cannot be approved without it
logotype_stamp.implementation: Load from assets directory - never use external CDN or third-party sources

BrandAssets.hierarchy: Brand → Industry → Product (in that priority order)
critical_rules: MUST display Husqvarna logotype stamp in upper-left corner
MUST load from official assets directory (design_system/assets/brand/)
Never alter, recolor, or reposition the logotype
Never distort proportions
Never substitute unofficial marks
Respect brand-hierarchy principle in all communications
